description: Create an interactive dashboard in Oracle Analytics Desktop to analyze customer loyalty using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. The dashboard should feature a Tag Cloud visualization titled 'VIP Customers (Top 50)' that displays 'Customer Name' sized by 'Profit' and colored by 'Customer Segment', restricted to the Top 50 customers by Profit. Include a dashboard filter for 'Order Date' (Year) and rename the canvas to 'Loyalty Analysis'. Save the completed workbook as 'Customer_Loyalty_Cloud'.
